MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-26-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DEMAS YAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED. Complaint is stricken as to the moving party only with leave to amend to allege in good faith non-duplicative claims (CGC-18-571386) against co-defendant Yan. Order submitted electronically is signed. Judge VJ Harry Jacobs, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2022 Continued To Aug-26-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Duy Thai; 415-296-9927; appearing n behalf of plaintiff Charles Li.

Mr. Thai contests the court's tentative ruling, and states that he has a conflict with the date of continuance. Mr. Thai states he has a hearing set in department 302 at the same date and time. The court informs counsel that the hearing in 302 will be continued and instructs counsel to contact that department for further information. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DEMAS YAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is continued to August 26, 2022.

Judge: Harry L. Jacobs (VJ); Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
